request: Run a separate Tier 2 smoke test for the real Generator -> Validator-A wrapper path.
request_original: 별도 Tier 2 smoke test Task를 하나 만들어 실제 Generator -> Validator-A를 끝까지 한 번 더 태워야 합니다.
tier_rationale: Exercises external model wrappers and creates smoke artifacts. No product runtime or authority document behavior changes.
success_criteria: Create a minimal Generator handoff that asks Generator to create or update only tasks/handoffs/TASK-20260429-015/smoke-target.md.
Run scripts/run-generator.mjs as a real execution on task/TASK-20260429-015, not dry-run.
If Generator succeeds, create Validator-A handoff and run scripts/run-validator-a.mjs as a real execution, not dry-run.
Record generator and validator artifacts, or Resource Failure artifacts if an external CLI cannot complete.
Do not treat Resource Failure as Validator FAIL.

positive: Keep the smoke target harmless and task-scoped.
negative: Do not include secrets in handoff payloads.
Do not modify files outside the smoke target and task operational artifacts.
